data.description: The yield on the 5-year Japanese government bond eases by 2 basis points to 1.815%.
Euro pares declines and moves little changed at $1.1762.

data.title: B2Gold Reports Update on Fire-Related Incident to the Crushing Circuit at the Goose Mine
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 19, 2026, B2Gold Corp. provided an update regarding the recent fire at the Goose Mine's crushing circuit that took place on the evening of April 16, 2026. The company disclosed that certain areas were affected by the incident. B2Gold, listed on the TSX as BTO, NYSE American as BTG, and NSX as B2G, outlined its near-term operational plan in response to the event. This announcement follows the news release issued by B2Gold on April 17, 2026.
BAT sees its price target reduced by AlphaValue to 4,233p, down from 4,272p.
TD Cowen increases its target price on Celestica to $350 versus $330 earlier.
Jefferies increases its target price on Prologis to $163 versus $155 earlier.
Russia’s Tuapse port is set ablaze in a “massive” Ukrainian drone attack, with one person killed, according to the regional governor.
The ECB is now seen delivering 25 bps rate hikes in June and September 2026, according to Barclays, versus prior forecasts of April and June increases.
India’s currency opens at 92.82 per dollar, slightly firmer than the last close of 92.92.
India’s 10-year benchmark government bond yield rises to 6.9094% from the previous close of 6.9049%.
Trump is set to participate in a private political meeting today with no media access, according to the White House.
Samsung inks an EV battery agreement with Mercedes as its Hungary plant undergoes a transition, Nikkei Asia says.
Hong Kong banks’ earnings strain is easing as cross-border flows improve, according to Fitch Ratings.
Anthony Scaramucci Says Bitcoin 'Checks Every Single Box' Of What Defines 'Money' And That's Why He's 'Bullish'

data.title: Aave's TVL drops by $8B after $293M Kelp DAO hack. Aave token falls by 20% to $89.5 in 24 hours amid massive withdrawals.
data.description: In a span of slightly more than 24 hours, the value of the Aave token plummeted by almost 20%, dropping to $89.5. This decline occurred concurrently with users withdrawing billions of dollars from the lending protocol.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric to Launch Railway Energy Management Solution Proof of Concept for Krakow Tram Network in Poland
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (Stock Symbol: 6503) revealed plans for a proof of concept (PoC) initiative involving a railway energy management solution (railway EMS) set to be implemented on the tram network in Krakow, Poland, starting in April 2026. This undertaking will integrate Mitsubishi Electric’s SerendieTM digital platform and energy storage systems (ESSs) to optimize the harnessing and application of excess regenerative braking energy produced during tram functions. The support for this project underlines Mitsubishi Electric’s commitment to enhancing energy efficiency in transportation systems.
Piper Sandler lifts its target price on Bank First Corp to $157 versus $150 earlier.
